form.formComment: Finished second last start (28.82) at big odds over 510m at Sale. Gets the rails draw this time. Looks tested in this line-up.

form.formComment: Finished second last start (26.37) over 460m at this track. Drawn close to the inside. One of the better hopes.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Finished second last start (26.37) over 460m at this track. Drawn close to the inside. One of the better hopes.

form.formComment: Solid performance to win by a neck at this track over 460m (26.78) beating Pacific Poppy in Grade 5 on April 9. Had been in fine form, hitting the frame three times on end, before a deserved win last time. Can go on with it.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Solid performance to win by a neck at this track over 460m (26.78) beating Pacific Poppy in Grade 5 on April 9. Had been in fine form, hitting the frame three times on end, before a deserved win last time. Can go on with it.

form.formComment: Big odds last time but gave a huge sight after a fast early split, grabbed late but holding on to a placing when a 2.5 lengths third (26.62) over 460m at this track. Fought on last time. Right in the mix again.

formComments.title: TAB

form.formComment: Last start finished 6th in a Grade 5 on April 10 over 350m at Healesville behind Bonded beaten 3.5 lengths (19.83). Leading chance on best form.

form.formComment: Missed the frame last start when a 11 length seventh (30.78) at Sandown. Previous form sound including a win three back at Bendigo. Has ability but will need everything to go right.
